task: Define rule model alert lifecycle and notifier contracts
acceptance_criteria: Rule definitions, alert states, and notifier boundary are stable
notes: Defined alert rule model, explicit alert states, and notifier request boundary

task: Implement rule evaluation over normalized metrics
acceptance_criteria: Rule engine evaluates approved basic rules and emits alert events
notes: Implemented threshold evaluation, open-alert refresh, and recovery transitions over normalized MetricSample inputs

task: Implement alert persistence recovery and notifier delivery
acceptance_criteria: Alert records, recoveries, and notifier calls are persisted and observable
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/notifier tests/integration/alert_pipeline -k lifecycle && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-alert-pipeline-postgres.ps1
notes: Persisted rules/alerts/history, exposed notification failures, and verified lifecycle against live PostgreSQL

acceptance_criteria: Rule engine, notifier, and alert integration suites pass together
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/rule_engine tests/notifier tests/integration/alert_pipeline && uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy apps tests gates
notes: Local suites, Ruff, Mypy, and PostgreSQL alert pipeline live gate all passed
